narrative:
Cols 73-L (precinct in Franklin County) has 977 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
